caption: gohai Dictionary
description: Attribute definitions for the gohai system facts extension (uid 1337).
name: dictionary

fqdn.caption: FQDN
fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name of the host.

machine_id.caption: Machine ID
machine_id.description: Persistent machine identifier from /etc/machine-id or IOPlatformUUID.

init_system.caption: Init System
init_system.description: The init system type: systemd, launchd, upstart, sysvinit.

virtualization_role.caption: Virtualization Role
virtualization_role.description: Whether this host is a virtualization 'host' or 'guest'.

virtualization_systems.caption: Virtualization Systems
virtualization_systems.description: All detected virtualization layers (name to role map).

cpu_flags.caption: CPU Flags
cpu_flags.description: CPU feature flags (aes, avx2, ssse3, etc.).

cpu_vulnerabilities.caption: CPU Vulnerabilities
cpu_vulnerabilities.description: CPU hardware vulnerability mitigation status from /sys.

distribution_id.caption: Distribution ID
distribution_id.description: Machine-readable OS distribution identifier from os-release (e.g. ubuntu, fedora).

version_codename.caption: Version Codename
version_codename.description: OS release codename from os-release (e.g. jammy, bookworm).

variant_id.caption: Variant ID
variant_id.description: OS variant from os-release (e.g. server, workstation, container).

kernel_version.caption: Kernel Version
kernel_version.description: Full kernel version string from uname -v.
